name: CFSC All Checks Cashed
description_short: CFSC All Checks Cashed offers check cashing without bank accounts, plus money transfers, bill pay, and prepaid cards at their Denver location on Federal Boulevard.
description_long:
CFSC All Checks Cashed operates as a full-service check-cashing and financial services provider with locations across multiple states, including a Denver location at 1255 S Federal Boulevard. The company positions itself as an alternative to traditional banking for customers who need immediate access to funds without the delays associated with standard bank clearing processes.

The Denver location offers a comprehensive suite of financial services beyond basic check cashing. These include money orders, electronic bill pay, domestic and international money transfers, prepaid debit cards (Yes! Debit Account), foreign currency exchange (80+ currencies), ATM access, prepaid cellular phone services, phone resale through EcoATM kiosks, business check cashing, tax refund check cashing, and transit card purchases. The company emphasizes convenience by bundling multiple services at single locations.

CFSC distinguishes itself through accessible check cashing without requiring a bank account—only a government-issued photo ID and verification information are needed. The company offers extended hours (8am-8pm weekdays, 8am-6pm weekends), immediate cash access without clearing delays, and no monthly fees. They also highlight partnerships with major payment networks (Western Union, Yes!, Boost, EcoATM) and appear to be actively hiring, suggesting operational expansion.

However, as a check-cashing service rather than a bank, CFSC does not offer traditional banking products like savings accounts, checking accounts, or credit products. The website contains a typo ("maks" instead of "makes") and provides limited transparency about fee structures—specific cashing fees are not disclosed. The service model relies on convenience and speed rather than building long-term financial relationships, and offerings vary by location, requiring customers to verify service availability.
pros: No bank account required to cash checks—only photo ID and personal information needed
Extended operating hours (8am-8pm weekdays, 8am-6pm weekends) provide access beyond standard banking hours
Immediate cash access without waiting for checks to clear, unlike traditional banks
Comprehensive service bundle includes 12+ financial services at single location (transfers, bill pay, prepaid cards, currency exchange)
No monthly fees or account maintenance charges
Government-issued photo ID flexibility (driver's license, passport, state ID, student ID, work ID accepted)
Yes! Debit Card available with no credit check required
cons: Check cashing fees are not disclosed on the website, making actual costs unclear to consumers
Limited to check-cashing and prepaid services—does not offer traditional bank accounts, savings, or credit products
Service offerings vary by location; customers must call to confirm availability of specific services
No information provided about maximum check amounts, hold policies, or processing limitations
Prepaid debit cards and other services likely carry their own undisclosed fees
best_for: Unbanked and underbanked individuals without access to traditional bank accounts
Customers needing immediate cash access and unable to wait for check clearing periods
International money transfer customers seeking convenient, multi-currency services
Business owners and self-employed individuals needing to cash business checks quickly
diagnosis: CFSC All Checks Cashed is best for unbanked and underbanked consumers who need immediate check cashing without a bank account, plus bundled financial services like money transfers and bill pay. The primary caveat is that specific fee structures are not disclosed on their website, and they do not offer traditional banking products—customers seeking savings accounts, credit-building tools, or long-term financial relationships should look elsewhere.
